name: Candidate-oracle gap
interpretation: Best deployed closure is 0.328025; previous aggregate-policy best is 0.244220 and mean aggregate closure is 0.160601. Sample-level no-harm/margin gates were also audited; best closure is 0.082804, so margin gating is not the missing fix. Direct candidate-regret gating reaches 0.329950 unconstrained and 0.327146 under harmful-accept <= 0.25; train-selected deployment reaches 0.328025 with harmful-accept 0.251111. The selected deployment harmful-accept rate is 0.251111.
next_action: Strengthen candidate-regret training with calibrated uncertainty, harmful-accept penalties, and cross-seed perturbations.

name: Long-horizon state integrity
interpretation: Best WPU H=25 integrity is 0.964322; guarded sparse is 0.958508, clipped sparse is 0.201757, regularized raw sparse is 0.087153, rollout-consistency sparse is 0.084549, and unsafe-delta rejected sparse is 0.530270 with rejection rate 0.640000.
next_action: Simple delta-norm and naive rollout-consistency regularization are insufficient; add state-validity loss, rollback, correction, and uncertainty escalation.

name: Simulator-backed benchmark
interpretation: PyBullet benchmark exists with 5 seeds and background up to N_bg=128, but it is still small.
next_action: Increase seeds, mechanisms, training scale, and long-horizon simulator rollouts.

name: Mechanism-family shift generalization
interpretation: catch_heavy: WPU 0.408730 vs baseline 0.349206; edge_shift: WPU 0.527778 vs baseline 0.571428; high_force: WPU 0.432540 vs baseline 0.460318
next_action: Add leave-family-out training, harder shifts, and mechanism-aware branch priors.

name: Calibration and uncertainty
interpretation: Mean WPU ECE is 0.211243; mean baseline ECE is 0.219257; ratio is 0.963449.
next_action: Add temperature heads, branch calibration loss, multi-step ECE/Brier/NLL, and uncertainty-gated recompute.

name: Systems profile and memory traffic
interpretation: Tensor-byte reduction reaches 0.997454 at mean total objects 2052.6; CPU tensorization latency reduction reaches 0.996035; random-model CPU sparse-forward latency reduction reaches 0.996975. GPU/energy and matched-accuracy data remain absent.
next_action: Measure CUDA memory, allocator traffic, sparse-kernel behavior, energy, and matched-accuracy speedups.

name: Objectification quality to propagation loss
interpretation: Clean score 0.957711, combined-corruption score 0.821712, combined frontier recall 0.742361. Metrics exist, but downstream loss coupling is incomplete.
next_action: Train/evaluate propagation under controlled objectification corruption and regress loss against report components.
